_description: Canonical list of JACS CLI commands. Update this file when adding/removing CLI commands. A snapshot test validates this fixture against the actual Clap command tree. The mcp_tool and mcp_excluded_reason fields document CLI-MCP alignment (see also binding-core/tests/fixtures/cli_mcp_alignment.json).

commands.about: Prints version and build information
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Meta command: prints version info, not applicable to MCP

commands.about: create a config file
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Setup command: creates jacs.config.json interactively, not applicable to MCP runtime

commands.about: read configuration and display to screen
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Diagnostic command: displays config to terminal, not applicable to MCP

commands.about: emit DNS TXT commands for publishing agent fingerprint
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Emits DNS TXT record commands for manual DNS provisioning; requires shell access

commands.about: create an agent
verify an agent
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Agent self-verification; MCP agents verify implicitly on load

commands.about: Look up another agent's public key and DNS info from their domain
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: DNS discovery helper; could be an MCP tool but currently CLI-only

commands.about: Rotate the agent's cryptographic keys
List active and archived key files
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Filesystem scan for archived keys; CLI-only diagnostic

commands.about: Repair config after an interrupted key rotation
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Crash recovery; requires filesystem access, CLI-only

commands.about: create a new JACS file
create a new version of document
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Document update remains CLI-only; no generic MCP update tool exists

commands.about: list agents that should sign document
create agreement for document
sign the agreement section of a document
verify document hash, signatures, and schema
extract embedded contents from JACS document
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Could be an MCP tool in the future

commands.about: Re-encrypt the private key with a new password
Start the built-in JACS MCP server
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Meta command: starts the MCP server itself, cannot be an MCP tool

commands.about: Assess trust level of a remote A2A Agent Card
Add a remote A2A agent to the local trust store
Discover a remote A2A agent via well-known Agent Card
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Interactive CLI workflow for discovering remote A2A agents

commands.about: Serve well-known endpoints for A2A discovery
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Long-running HTTP server process, not suitable as MCP tool

commands.about: Create/load agent and start serving A2A endpoints
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Combined create-and-serve convenience; orchestration command not suitable for MCP

commands.about: Create or load a persistent agent for instant sign/verify
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Setup command: creates/loads persistent agent, not applicable to MCP runtime

commands.about: Initialize JACS by creating both config and agent
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Setup command: initializes config and agent, not applicable to MCP runtime

commands.about: Create a signed attestation
Verify an attestation document
Export an attestation as a DSSE envelope
Verify a signed JACS document (no agent required)
Convert JACS documents between JSON, YAML, and HTML formats
commands.mcp_excluded_reason: Format conversion could be an MCP tool in the future

commands.about: Sign a text/markdown file in place with an inline JACS signature
Verify inline JACS signatures in a text/markdown file
Sign an image (PNG, JPEG, WebP) by embedding a JACS signature
Verify an embedded JACS signature in an image
Extract the embedded JACS signature payload from an image

feature_gated_commands.about: Store a password in the OS keychain for an agent
feature_gated_commands.mcp_excluded_reason: OS keychain integration; requires local system access, not applicable to MCP

feature_gated_commands.about: Retrieve the stored password for an agent
feature_gated_commands.mcp_excluded_reason: OS keychain integration; requires local system access, not applicable to MCP

feature_gated_commands.about: Remove the stored password for an agent from the OS keychain
feature_gated_commands.mcp_excluded_reason: OS keychain integration; requires local system access, not applicable to MCP

feature_gated_commands.about: Check if a password is stored for an agent in the OS keychain
feature_gated_commands.mcp_excluded_reason: OS keychain integration; requires local system access, not applicable to MCP
